_meta.description: Procedural world generation tables for Canon Engine

lore_templates: Long ago, {prefix} was a thriving settlement until the {event} drove everyone away.
The locals whisper of a {creature} that haunts the {feature} at night.
Ancient runes carved into the {feature} speak of a forgotten {artifact}.
Travelers report strange lights near {prefix} on moonless nights.
A battle between {faction_a} and {faction_b} was fought here centuries ago.
The {feature} is said to hold the entrance to a vast underground {dungeon_type}.
Merchants avoid the road through {prefix}, citing frequent {event} attacks.
A hermit once lived atop the {feature}, studying the stars and brewing potions.
The ruins of {prefix} contain a sealed door that no lockpick can open.
Legend says a {artifact} lies hidden somewhere within {prefix}.
